import { Container, Grid } from '@material-ui/core' import React, { useState } from 'react' import SubjectCards from '../components/SubjectCards' import kulas from '../images/kulas.png' import daks from '../images/daks.png' import phil from '../images/phil.png' export default function StudentDashboard() { const [subjects, setSubjects] = useState([ { title: 'Web Development', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Phil Cajurao', image: {phil}, id: 1 }, { title: 'Web Design', body: 'JavaScript Programming', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Phil Cajurao', image: {phil}, id: 3 }, { title: 'Calculus', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Jomari Dacles', image: {daks}, id: 4 }, { title: 'Arduino', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Jomari Dacles', image: {daks}, id: 5 }, { title: 'Numerical Methods', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Jomari Dacles', image: {daks}, id: 6 }, { title: 'Engineering Basics', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Phil Cajurao', image: {phil}, id: 7 }, { title: 'Graphic Designing', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Nicolas Sumagaysay', image: {kulas}, id: 8 }, { title: 'Python Programming', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Phil Cajurao', image: {phil}, id: 9 }, { title: 'Art App', body: 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.', instructor: 'Nicolas Sumagaysay', image: {kulas}, id: 10 }, ]) return (
{subjects.map(subject => ( {subject.image} ))}
) }
